## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Code formatted (`black src/ tests/` and `isort src/ tests/`)
- [ ] No lint errors (`flake8 src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Type hints on all new functions
- [ ] Docstrings on all new public functions
- [ ] Updated relevant docs if needed
